about.metaTitle: About — Xplania, travel differently at last
about.metaDescription: Xplania centralizes the entire travel experience: before, during and after. Discover the story and vision behind the platform.
about.heroSubtitle: Travel should be an experience, not a complex logistics project. Xplania reinvents the way you prepare, live and relive your trips.

story.title: The why 💭
story.p1: Travel has always been part of me 🌍 But one specific moment changed everything.
story.p2: Before a trip abroad, I found myself with 9 browser tabs open: packing, budget, visa, places, culture, souvenirs…
story.p3: And I realized something: we spend more time organizing the trip than actually living it.

items.title: First reflections
items.desc: Early research on the travel experience and traveler frustrations.

items.title: Beta launch
items.desc: First beta version of Xplania opened to Early Explorers.

value.title: One platform, the whole experience ✈️
value.body: Xplania is the only platform that centralizes the entire travel experience: before, during and after — all in one place.

hero.subtitle: Xplania is your intelligent travel copilot. Budget, visas, packing — every step of your prep, centralized in one place.

features.title: Everything you need to leave with peace of mind
features.subtitle: Eight AI-powered tools to prepare, live and tell your trip from A to Z

valise.title: Smart packing
valise.tagline: A tailor-made checklist of what to bring.
valise.description: We automatically generate a packing list adapted to your destination, the forecast and the duration of your stay. No more forgotten essentials or overweight bags.

budget.title: Budget guide
budget.tagline: Estimate and track your spending while traveling.
budget.description: We estimate the total cost of your trip based on the country and your travel style, and you track your spending day by day to stay within your plan.
budget.benefit2: Adjust your budget to local cost of living

visa.title: Visa & paperwork guide
visa.tagline: Know exactly which documents to prepare before leaving.
visa.description: We give you the precise list of documents required based on your nationality and destination: visa, passport, vaccines, insurance.
visa.benefit2: Have all required documents on D-day

journal.title: Travel journal
journal.tagline: Document and relive your trip in just a few clicks.
journal.description: Notes, photos, moods and places, day by day. AI turns your memories into an immersive story, exportable as PDF and shareable via public link.
journal.benefit1: Keep an emotional trace of every trip
journal.benefit2: Share your memories with your loved ones

tracking.title: Live trip tracking
tracking.tagline: Your real-time companion during the trip.
tracking.description: Live map, dynamic timeline of stops, automatic check-in on arrival and hyper-local AI suggestions based on your location, weather and mood.
tracking.benefit1: Track your progress and stats live

explore.title: Travel Map
explore.tagline: Your trip becomes an exploration game.
explore.description: Branched interactive map, clickable points, badges to unlock and gamified progression. Every place you visit earns you points and brings you closer to the ultimate Globe Trotter badge.
explore.benefit1: Explore your trip like a living game
explore.benefit2: Unlock badges and points by visiting

mood.title: Mood Explorer
mood.tagline: Pick an emotion, we'll find the perfect spot.
mood.description: You're not looking for a place, you're looking for a feeling. Pick your mood (chill, romantic, food, party…) and get hyper-personalized AI recommendations based on your location, the weather and the time of day.

discover.title: Discover
discover.tagline: The best local spots around you, in real time.
discover.description: Contextual recommendations based on your location, time and weather. Interactive map, hidden gems, natural-language search ('brunch with a view') and personal lists to organize your favorites.
discover.benefit2: Get hidden-gem alerts as you walk

howItWorks.title: How Xplania works
howItWorks.subtitle: A simple three-step approach to travel with peace of mind
howItWorks.step1Title: Tell us where you want to go
howItWorks.step1Desc: Destination, dates, travel style: we ask just the right questions — neither too many nor too few.
howItWorks.step2Desc: In seconds, you get your budget, packing list and visa requirements, ready to use.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Travel journal, live tracking, mood explorer and real-time recommendations: everything is already available in the beta.

benefits.subtitle: Xplania isn't just a website, it's your intelligent travel copilot. We remove the mental load of budget, visas and packing so you can focus on what matters: the joy of discovery.
benefits.timeDesc: Stop spending hours digging through contradictory info on visas or budget. Xplania centralizes everything.
benefits.calmDesc: Leave with the certainty you forgot nothing thanks to smart, personalized planning.
benefits.controlDesc: Manage your budget in real time with estimates based on the local cost of living.

legal.contactNote: For any question, write to us at

sections.heading: Editor
sections.body:
Xplania is an individual entrepreneurial project created by Juliette Noël, based in Lille, France. No registered legal entity to date.

Contact: juliettenoel.xplania@gmail.com
Publication director: Juliette Noël.

sections.heading: Hosting
sections.body: The site is hosted by Lovable (lovable.dev). For any hosting-related request, users may contact Lovable directly.

sections.heading: Intellectual Property
sections.body:
All Xplania content — including texts, the Pip penguin mascot, the Xplania name and logo, visual identity and AI-generated travel recommendations — is the exclusive property of the creator. It is protected under the French Intellectual Property Code (Code de la propriété intellectuelle), which grants the same level of protection as standard copyright law in most jurisdictions.

Any reproduction, representation or reuse without prior written consent is strictly forbidden.

sections.heading: Personal Data
sections.body:
Xplania collects two categories of data:
• your email address, for beta registration and account creation;
• an approximate geolocation, used in real time to personalize destination suggestions — not stored persistently.

Data is collected with your consent. You may access, correct or request deletion of your data at any time by writing to juliettenoel.xplania@gmail.com. Your data is never sold or shared with third parties for commercial purposes. See the Privacy Policy for full details.

sections.heading: Cookies
sections.body: Xplania uses only technical cookies necessary for the site to operate and anonymous analytics cookies. No advertising or third-party tracking cookies are set without explicit consent.

sections.heading: Applicable Law
sections.body: This legal notice is governed by French law. In the event of a dispute, and failing an amicable resolution, the competent courts will be those of Lille, France.

sections.heading: Who we are
sections.body:
Xplania is an individual project run by Juliette Noël, based in Lille, France.

Contact: juliettenoel.xplania@gmail.com

sections.heading: Data collected and why
sections.body:
• Email address — beta registration and account creation. Legal basis: consent (GDPR art. 6.1.a). Retention: duration of the beta + 12 months after the last activity.

• Approximate geolocation — used in real time to suggest relevant destinations. No precise GPS data is stored. Legal basis: consent (GDPR art. 6.1.a).

• Anonymous usage analytics — pages visited, features used. No personal identifier is attached. Legal basis: legitimate interest. Retention: 24 months.

sections.heading: Data access
sections.body:
Only Juliette Noël has access to the data. Technical sub-processors: an email delivery service (for transactional emails) and Lovable (platform hosting).

No data is ever sold, rented or shared with advertisers.

sections.heading: Your rights (GDPR)
sections.body:
Under the EU General Data Protection Regulation, you have a right of access, rectification, erasure, withdrawal of consent, and the right to lodge a complaint with the French data protection authority CNIL (www.cnil.fr), which is the equivalent of the ICO or your national DPA.

All requests receive a reply within 30 days at most. Contact: juliettenoel.xplania@gmail.com.

sections.heading: Security
sections.body: All exchanges are encrypted over HTTPS. Access to the data is restricted and password-protected.

sections.heading: Acceptance
sections.body: By using Xplania, you accept these Terms. The service is currently in beta, as part of the Early Explorers program.

sections.heading: Service description
sections.body: Xplania is an AI-powered travel planning platform. It offers mood-based itineraries, a smart packing assistant, budget guides, gamified travel maps, live tracking and travel journals. Features may evolve freely during the beta.

sections.heading: Beta program
sections.body: The service is provided free of charge during the beta. Xplania may limit access, modify features or discontinue the program at any time, without prior notice. Beta users may be invited to share feedback to help improve the product.

sections.heading: User responsibilities
sections.body: You agree to use Xplania for lawful personal travel planning only. The following are forbidden: reverse engineering, copying the service, sharing your account access, or any unauthorized automated use.

sections.heading: AI content disclaimer
sections.body:
AI-generated recommendations are provided for informational and inspirational purposes only. They do not constitute professional travel advice.

Xplania cannot be held responsible for inaccuracies, changes in local conditions, visa requirements or any travel disruption. You must always verify critical information (visa, health, safety, schedules) through official sources before traveling.

sections.heading: Intellectual property
sections.body: All Xplania content, visual identity and branding are protected under French law. No reproduction is allowed without prior written consent.

sections.heading: Liability
sections.body: The service is provided "as is" during the beta, without warranty. The creator cannot be held liable for indirect or consequential damages arising from the use of the service.

sections.heading: Modifications
sections.body: These Terms may be updated. Any significant change will be notified by email to registered users. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.

sections.heading: Applicable law
sections.body: These Terms are governed by French law. Failing an amicable resolution, the courts of Lille, France, shall have exclusive jurisdiction.

casualUrban.weatherTip: Perfect in mild weather. Add a light jacket if it gets windy.
casualUrban.culturalTip: All-purpose outfit accepted in most public places.

elegantEvening.title: Elegant Evening Outfit
elegantEvening.weatherTip: Bring a light blazer — evenings can be cool.
elegantEvening.culturalTip: Some restaurants require smart attire. Check before you go.

natureExploration.title: Nature Exploration Look
natureExploration.weatherTip: Layer up to adapt to temperature swings.
natureExploration.culturalTip: Some natural sites require covered shoulders and knees.

beachRelax.title: Beach & Chill Look
beachRelax.weatherTip: SPF 50 sunscreen is a must. Stay hydrated.
beachRelax.culturalTip: Topless isn't allowed everywhere. Check local customs.

businessTravel.title: Business Travel Look
businessTravel.weatherTip: Conference rooms are often air-conditioned — bring a layer.
businessTravel.culturalTip: In some countries, business cards are exchanged with both hands.

budget.alertsSubtitle: AI watches your spending and suggests fixes
budget.tipsSubtitle: Practical tips to travel smart and save

local.d: Eat local to cut costs and discover real cuisine at your destination.

transit.d: Use public transit instead of taxis to save up to 70%.

museum.d: Visit free museums on Mondays or take advantage of free-entry days.

lastMin.d: Book some activities the day before to get up to 30% off.

shop.d: Buy souvenirs at local markets rather than tourist hotspots.

breakfast.d: Pick a stay with breakfast included to save on meals.

walk.d: Join free walking tours (tip-based) to explore without breaking the bank.

pass.d: Buy a city pass if you plan to visit several paid attractions.

testimonials.title: What early explorers are saying
testimonials.subtitle: Real feedback from beta testers — picked for their honesty.

t1.name: Kajinoma
t1.text: Honestly I think it's perfect, it's truly a brilliant idea. Zero problems during testing.

t2.name: Victor Vaas
t2.text: Works perfectly. I'd love to see a 'speed' version of the planner, and even more images in the generated guide.

t3.name: Mélanie Garnier
t3.text: I really liked that she talked about how much time we spend looking for travel info. I totally relate to the idea that everything is scattered and ends up being more tiring than enjoyable.

t4.name: Tiphaine Letourneur
t4.text: Really great. I'd love to see even more place suggestions and weather refined by region or city.

t5.name: Deeruven Sobaroyen
t5.text: I love the concept of your app, never seen anything like it! You're offering a solution that cuts down both the planning time and the mental load that comes with it — it can only be beneficial.

t6.name: Shivdeep Singh
t6.text: Interesting concept — positioning Xplania as a 'travel co-pilot' and focusing on the preparation phase (budget, visa, luggage) is a smart angle. Most platforms only tackle booking, so addressing the prep stage is genuinely relevant.

faq.title: Everything you're wondering
faq.subtitle: Clear answers to the questions we get most often.

q1.a: Yes. You get 3 free trip generations to try every tool. No card required, no commitment. Paid packs arrive at public launch for heavier use.

q2.q: What does the AI actually do?
q2.a: Saves you hours: it analyzes your destination, profile and preferences to generate a tailored packing list, realistic budget, local activities, visa tips, a travel story… Everything is personalized, never generic.

q3.a: Yes. EU hosting, standard encryption, no resale to third parties. You can delete your account and all your data at any time from your profile.

q4.a: Offline mode is currently in development: it will let you access your journal, tracking map and steps even without signal, with automatic sync when wifi returns. Coming soon.

q5.q: Can I share my trip with friends and family?
q5.a: Yes, for free. Public journal via link, real-time tracking share, PDF export — you choose what to make visible and to whom.

q6.a: Premium plans are scheduled for late 2026 / early 2027. Join the premium list to get early access and an exclusive launch discount reserved for beta explorers.

addNode.title: Add a trip stop
addNode.desc: Write your route yourself, no AI needed — every stop adds points and unlocks badges.
addNode.namePh: E.g. Café de Flore, Sunset at Sacré-Cœur…
addNode.descPh: A note, a feeling, a detail to remember…

suggestions.title: AI suggestions
suggestions.empty: Run AI to discover local places to add to your route.

replay.empty: Visit places to replay your trip as a metro line ✨
